Interface JasperIPdfExporter

All Superinterfaces:
JasperIExporter, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
JasperPdfExporter
public interface JasperIPdfExporter extends JasperIExporter

JasperIPdfExporter interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
